narrative:
Richland Township has 8,746 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.2%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points.
